userMessage: Set up CAN FD decode on B1 source CH2 500kbps nominal 2Mbps data phase ISO standard. Set up search on B1 for CAN FD error frames. Set edge trigger on CH2 rising 1.65V. Enable FastFrame 500 frames single sequence. After capture query FastFrame timestamp for all frames, save CH2 waveform as binary and screenshot.

response.text:
I can’t safely emit applyable TekAutomate flow JSON for this request because verification is incomplete for several required SCPI pieces.

Verified this turn:
- `BUS:ADDNew`
- `BUS:B<x>:TYPe`
- `BUS:B<x>:CAN:BITRate`
- `BUS:B<x>:CAN:STANDard`
- `BUS:B<x>:CAN:FD:BITRate`
- `TRIGger:{A|B}:EDGE:SOUrce`
- `TRIGger:{A|B}:EDGE:SLOpe`
- `TRIGger:{A|B}:LEVel:CH<x>`
- `HORizontal:FASTframe:STATE`
- `HORizontal:FASTframe:COUNt`
- `ACQuire:STOPAfter`
- `ACQuire:SEQuence:NUMSEQuence`
- `ACQuire:STATE`

Not sufficiently verified this turn:
- bus input source assignment for `B1` to `CH2`
- the full search setup chain for CAN FD error frames on `B1` including source/condition/enable
- the exact FastFrame timestamp query command for all frames

Because those are required to satisfy your request end-to-end, I’m failing closed rather than guessing. If you want, on the next turn I can build it once those exact headers are retrieved.
